# Revalidation Copilot

> An AI-powered app that helps UK nurses complete their NMC revalidation — reflective accounts, CPD tracking, practice hours, feedback, and reflective discussion notes, all in one place.

## What it does

- **Generates NMC-compliant reflective accounts** — speak or type your experience, the app structures it into the NMC format with Code connections, ready to review and export
- **Tracks CPD hours** — log participatory and non-participatory CPD, see running totals against the 35-hour requirement
- **Calculates practice hours** — enter your date range and contracted schedule, the app works out your total automatically
- **Organises feedback and reflective discussion notes** — keep everything for your 3-year cycle in one dashboard
- **Supports the NMC Code** — reflections auto-link to the four themes: prioritise people, practise effectively, preserve safety, promote professionalism and trust

## Who it's for

UK nurses, midwives, and nursing associates on the NMC register who want to complete revalidation without last-minute stress.

## Pricing

- Free to try (1 free AI generation, full dashboard access)
- £12.99/year for unlimited AI generations, save and export

## About

Built by Beemal Innovation Ltd. Independent tool — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or approved by the Nursing and Midwifery Council (NMC).
